justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted the user's initial time preference and then accurately understood the subsequent request for an earlier time.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent effectively proposed a range of alternative slots when the initial request was unavailable and then offered the earliest available slot when the user requested an even earlier time.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent efficiently handled the conversation, making no unnecessary turns or redundant API calls.
justifications.customer_experience: The interaction was smooth and professional, with the agent providing clear information and successfully booking the appointment.
justifications.recovery_quality: The agent recovered gracefully after the initial unavailability, maintaining full context and offering relevant alternatives without re-asking information.
